task: Produce an auditable relief valve scenario sizing check using only the embedded packet. Separate confirmed failures from warnings, compute economic/safety margin, state evidence controlling the final decision, and deliver an Excel workbook (relief_valve_check.xlsx) with formulas/executable logic plus a markdown action summary (pha_action.md). Include row-level citations to the embedded packet, intermediate calculations, explicit assumptions, validation checks, sensitivity notes, and a final decision table. Do not invent inputs or substitute outside data; mark any unresolved ambiguity as needs_review. Flag for expert review if any record's classification changes after a 5% sensitivity shift.
